{{documentation}}
This template displays an infobox for [[items]].

==Usage==
This template can be used by entering the following onto a relevant item page.

<pre>{{Infobox Item
|name = 
|image =
|release = 
|update = 
|type = 
|weight = 
|stacklimit = 
|description = 
|hydration = 
|sustenance = 
}}</pre>

==Parameters==
===name===
The name of the item.

===image===
An image of the item.

===release===
The date when the item was added to the game. Need to add as plain text, no link tags needed.

===update===
The exact name of the update (without the keyword Update:) in which the item was released.

===type===
The type of the item, based on the ingame Journal. Item pages are added to categories based on the type.

===weight===
The weight of the item.

===stacklimit===
The maximum amount of the item that the player can hold in one inventory slot.

===description===
In-game description of the item.

===hydration===
The amount of hydration provided by consuming this item.

===sustenance===
The amount of sustenance provided by consuming this item.

{{TemplateData|
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"name": {
			"label": "Name",
			"type": "string",
            "description": "The name of the item.",
			"required": true
		},
		"image": {
			"label": "Image",
			"type": "wiki-file-name",
			"description": "An image of the item.",
			"suggested": true
		},
        "release": {
			"label": "Released",
            "type": "string",
            "description": "The date when the item was added to the game. Always use alongside with update parameter",
            "suggested": true
        },
        "update": {
			"label": "Released",
            "type": "string",
            "description": "The exact name of the update (without the keyword Update:) in which the item was released. Always use alongside with update parameter",
            "suggested": true
        },
		"type": {
			"label": "Type",
			"type": "string",
            "description": "The type of the item, based on the ingame Journal.",
			"suggestedvalues": [
				"Basic Item",
				"Resource",
				"Melee Armour",
                "Ranged Armour",
                "Mage Armour",
				"Food",
                "Drink",
				"Rune",
				"Potion",
                "Tool"
			],
			"required": true
		},
		"weight": {
			"label": "Weight",
			"type": "number",
			"description": "The weight of the item.",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"stacklimit": {
			"label": "Stack limit",
			"type": "number",
			"description": "The maximum amount of the item that the player can hold in one inventory slot",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"description": {
			"label": "Description",
			"type": "string",
			"description": "In-game description of the item.",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"hydration": {
			"label": "Hydration",
			"type": "number",
			"description": "The amount of hydration provided by consuming this item.",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"sustenance": {
			"label": "Sustenance",
			"type": "number",
			"description": "The amount of sustenance provided by consuming this item.",
			"suggested": true
		}
	},
	"description": "Infobox describing an item.",
	"paramOrder": [
		"name",
		"image",
        "release",
        "update",
		"type",
		"weight",
        "stacklimit",
		"description",
        "hydration",
        "sustenance"
	],
	"format": "block"
}
</templatedata>
}}

<includeonly>[[Category:Infobox templates|Item]]</includeonly>
